title: Sticks To Diamonds
description: This is a simple Datapack which adds a custom crafting recipe, where sticks can turn into diamonds.
body:
This is a small and simple mod which just adds a crafting recipe to turn sticks into diamonds.

This was designed for 1.20 but should work with other versions with no issue.

This is mostly a joke project meant to troll your friends, so do with this as you please.
